title: Police Chief
summary: Download the Complete Job Description The Police Chief manages and oversees the daily operations and successional planning of the Cordova Police Department to include law enforcement, dispatch, contract jail facility, DMV, and animal control . CLASSIFICATION: FULL TIME, OVERTIME EXEMPT, SALARIED AND CONFIDENTIAL STARTING SALARY: $91,350 – $125,577 ANNUALLY, DOE HOURS: VARIABLE, INCLUDES NIGHTS, HOLIDAYS, AND WEEKENDS BENEFITS: RELOCATION ASSISTANCE, SIGNING BONUS FOR CERTIFIED OFFICERS, ALASKA...

title: AST Death Investigation: Big Lake [AK25037617]
summary: On 04/21/2025 at approximately 1712 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to a report of a death at an address on Huskie Drive in Big Lake. Investigation revealed a 66-year-old male died at the residence. No foul play is suspect. Next of kin was on location.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Motor Vehicle Collision - Injury: Wasilla [AK25037341]
summary: On 04/21/2025 at approximately 0937 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to Knik Goose Bay Road and Country Drive in Wasilla for a report of a three-vehicle collision. Injuries were reported. The roadway was shut down for a short period for emergency responders.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Search and Rescue: Kivalina [AK25035495]
summary: On 04/16/2025 at approximately 09:55 hours, Alaska State Troopers received a report of an overdue snowmachiner. The person was located by his broken down snowmachine and flown to Kotzebue. No injuries. Ground searchers were recalled. Case closed.

title: AST SAR: Petersburg [AK25037249]
summary: On April 20, 2025, at 8:10 pm, Alaska Wildlife Troopers received a report of missing person on Mitkof Island, near Petersburg. An at-risk adult male had walked away from his caregivers while on a remote logging road. The male suffers from numerous health issues. A SAR and EMS response was activated....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST SAR/Death: Fairbanks [AK25036936]
summary: On April 19, 2025, at 1:48 pm, Fairbanks AST received a 911 call from Mark Fraley, age 70, that he was experiencing a medical emergency while snowmachining off Himilaya Road. AWT responded, and transported a Steese fire department paramedic to the area by snowmachine and located Fraley deceased. The...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Willow [AK25037211]
summary: On 04/20/2025 at approximately 1747 hours, Alaska State Troopers contacted and arrested Janis John, age 45 of Talkeetna, at an address on Amundsen Ave. in Willow. John had a warrant for PTRP and was remanded to the Mat-Su Pretrial Facility.
